config-without-schema.reason: Existing permissive configs must gain explicit schemas and version policy.

currency-persistence-call.reason: Existing direct persistence calls must migrate to the economy transaction boundary.

game-event-publication.reason: Existing direct sends must migrate behind the authoritative gameplay-event publisher.

pet-record-mutation.reason: Existing pet creation bypasses must migrate to pet mint or transfer transactions.

remote-construction.reason: Existing code-declared and service-owned remotes must migrate to the network manifest.

runtime-wait.reason: Existing timers require classification and synchronization waits must migrate to completion contracts.

service-global-locator.reason: Existing global lookups must migrate to declared dependencies or event subscriptions.
